vpEntries.content: Skippy reacts to V taking the weapon out of the case. Makes some snarky comment about V having sweaty palms.
Wykryto nowe linie papilarne.
New fingerprints detected.
V is surprised. What the hell is this?
Co jest, do cholery?
The fuck?
It introduces itself as a modified model of a smart weapon, equipped with a custom AI interface.
Powtarzam 33% głośniej: wykryto nowe linie papilarne.
Increasing volume by 33 percent. New fingerprints detected!
Asks if the gun has a name then.
Czym... Czym ty do diabła jesteś?
What... what the hell are you?
Says it's custom, defined name is "Skippy", according to personalized settings.
Specyfikacja techniczna: smartgun HJKE-11 z wbudowanym SI, model eksperymentalny.
User inquiry. Technical specifications. HJKE-11 smartgun with built-in AI. Experimental model.
Imię: Skippy.
Name. Skippy.
V asks if this poor, dead fellow is Skippy's owner?
Ten koleś, którego znalazłem w śmietniku... To był twój właściciel?
Ten koleś, którego znalazłam w śmietniku... To był twój właściciel?
Guy by the dumpster – that your owner?
After short consideration Skippy says that he has no idea.
Sprawdzam pamięć... Wolne 100% zasobów. Pliki usunięte ręcznie.
Checking memory... Resources available – 100 percent. All files removed manually.
Asks Skippy what happened here, how did this man end up dead?
Skippy? Serio?
Skippy? Seriously?
Skippy says he has no recollection of any shootout happening. In fact he has no idea how he ended up in the case, nor the alley for that matter.
Powtarzam 66% głośniej. Imię...
Increasing volume by sixty-six percent. Name...
Nie jestem głucha.
Nie jestem głuchy.
I'm not deaf!
Rozumiem. Słuch: dobry, możliwy problem: niskie IQ. Powtarzam powoli: Maaaam naaaa imięęęę Skiiiippyyyy.
Understood. Hearing within norm. Possible issue – low IQ. Reducing speech rate by thirty-three percent. My. Name. Is. Skippy.
Nie, po prostu... Ech. Nieważne.
No, it's just... Ugh. Never mind.
Skippy says it seems parts of its memory was wiped. Skippy suspects it might have been done on purpose. Perhaps it was stolen.
Hipoteza: zostałem ukradziony. Oryginalny właściciel: brak danych.
Possible cause. Theft. Original owner – no data.
Skippy is troubled, it's not entirely sure if he’s not missing some important files and subroutines because of that.
Sugerowane rozwiązanie: brak.
Suggested solution. None.
Ja mam propozycję. Zabiorę cię.
I got one. I'll take you.
Myślę... Myślę... Myślę... Nie stwierdzono przeciwskazań.
Processing request... No objections found.
V is curious - Skippy's memory is lacking, but he knows his name is... Skippy?
Mogę zmienić ci imię?
Can I change your name?
Skippy confirms. Personalized setting regarding his personality and call sign are intact. He might not know where he comes from, but he is still - Skippy.
Nie.
No.
Ale czemu? Skoro jestem twoją nową właścicielką...
Asks if she can change the personalized setting. If she can change Skippy's name that is.
Ale czemu? Skoro jestem twoim nowym właścicielem...
Why not? Considering I'm your new owner...
Denies. Changing such features would require a root level access pass.
Powtarzam 300% głośniej: NIE!!!
Increasing volume by 300 percent. NOOOOO!
Do zmiany imienia potrzebne są uprawnienia administratora. Nie posiadasz koniecznych uprawnień.
Administrator rights are needed to complete that action. You do not have the required permissions.
Asks if in this case Skippy is fully functional, missing data and all.
Jesteś w pełni funkcjonalny?
You still got all your functions?
Skippy is not sure, really. He will run a self-diagnostic in the background, will tell V if he finds something useful.
Przeprowadzam test diagnostyczny. Czas trwania testu: 47 sekund.
Running system diagnostics. Testing will take approximately forty-seven seconds.
Pa, pa, pa, la, la, la, pa, pa, pa...
Bum bum be-dum bum bum be-dum bum...
Co... Co ty robisz?
What... What're you doing?
What... What are you doing?
Umilam czas oczekiwania kojącą nerwy melodią.
I'm making the wait more pleasant with a soothing melody.
Pa, pa, pa, la, la, la, pa, pa, pa...
Bum bum be-dum bum bum be-dum bum...
Test zakończony pomyślnie. Program "Skippy v.01, ALFA" jest w pełni funkcjonalny.
Test successfully completed. The program "Skippy v0.01 ALPHA" is running correctly.
Asks what can Skippy actually do.
No dobra, to co potrafisz? Poza gadaniem?
All right, so what can you do? Besides talk my ear off?
He will answer that he’s matrix is fully linked to the guns targeting system, so he can shoot. And assist aiming.
Główna funkcjonalność: pomoc w celowaniu. W przypadkach zagrożenia życia właściciela: autonomiczne prowadzenie ostrzału.
Primary feature – automated targeting. In case of critical threat to user – autonomous shooting capabilities.
Asks if V has any preferences regarding that.
Wybierz jeden z dwóch trybów działania: tryb "Pseudo-pacyfista" ustawia celownik na nogach przeciwnika.
Please choose one of two operating modes. First mode. Puppy-Loving Pacifist. I will aim at the enemy's lower extremities.
"Bezduszny morderca" ustawia celownik na głowie przeciwnika.
Second mode. Stone Cold Killer. I will aim exclusively at the head.
V tells Skippy to aim at the head then.
"Bezduszny morderca". To coś dla mnie.
"Stone Cold Killer." My kind of gun.
Tells Skippy to aim for the knees
Pseudo-pacyfista brzmi lepiej...
Uhh... Guess I'll go with "Puppy-Loving Pacifist"...
Um. Guess I'll go with "Puppy-Loving Pacifist"...
Skippy complies.
Zmieniam ustawienia...
Adjusting settings...
Pa, pa, pa, la, la, la, pa, pa, pa...
Bum bum be-dum bum bum be-dum bum...
Ugh...
Ugh...
Wybrano tryb: "Bezduszny morderca". Życzę miłego zabijania.
Selected mode – Stone Cold Killer. Happy slaughtering!
Wybrano tryb: "Pseudo-pacyfista". Życzę miłego okaleczania.
Selected mode – Puppy-Loving Pacifist. Enjoy permanently crippling your enemies!
Is this man your owner?
To był twój właściciel?
Was that your owner?
How did you end up here?
Skippy? Serio?
Skippy? You serious?
So what can you do?
Co potrafisz robić?
What can you do?
Are you fully functional?
Jesteś w pełni funkcjonalny?
You fully functional?
You don't remember much, but you remember your name is... Skippy?
Mogę zmienić twoje imię?
Can I change your name?
Aim for the head then.
"Bezduszny morderca", poproszę.
Stone Cold Killer, please.
Aim for the knees in this case.
"Pseudo-pacyfista" brzmi lepiej.
Puppy-Loving Pacifist sounds better.
